title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information to guests at a hotel.
audio_script: Man: Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the Riverside Hotel. I hope you had a pleasant journey. I would like to give you a few details about the hotel before you go to your rooms. Breakfast is served in the restaurant on the [14]first[/14] floor. It starts at seven, but at weekends it begins half an hour later. If you need an early breakfast, please tell reception tonight. The swimming pool is open every day until [15]nine[/15] o'clock in the evening. Children under twelve must be with an adult. Towels for the pool are not in your bedrooms; you can collect them from the [16]gym[/16]. This evening, dinner will be available from six thirty. The special dish is fresh [17]salmon[/17], but there are also pasta and salad choices. If you want to visit the town centre, the bus stop is opposite the hotel. A ticket costs [18]two fifty[/18], and buses leave every twenty minutes. Finally, please remember that room keys must be left at reception when you go out. If you have any questions, ask our night manager, Mr [19]Clark[/19], who will be at the desk after ten. If anything in your room is not working, please tell reception as soon as possible, rather than waiting until the morning. We can usually solve small problems quickly. The hotel has free Wi-Fi in all public areas, and the password is printed on your key card. Please check the notice board before you leave, because small changes to rooms or times may be written there. If you are not sure about anything, ask a member of staff.

questions.explanation: The speaker says breakfast is served in the restaurant on the first floor.
The speaker says the swimming pool is open until nine o'clock.
The speaker says towels can be collected from the gym.
The speaker says the special dish is fresh salmon.
The speaker says a bus ticket costs two fifty.
The speaker says the night manager is Mr Clark.
